title: Hapalochilus trigonocarpus
taxonomy: Hapalochilus trigonocarpus is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. It is native to tropical Africa, specifically in the countries of Democratic Republic of the Congo, Tanzania, and Uganda. The classification of Hapalochilus trigonocarpus includes it being a member of the genus Hapalochilus and the order Commelinales. The plant is further classified under the family Commelinaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The species is still being studied by botanists, and more research is needed to fully understand its classification.
